title: :focus-visible
description: Shows a focus indicator only when the browser determines one is needed — typically keyboard navigation or assistive technology. Mouse and touch users don't see the ring, keyboard users always do. Baseline widely available since 2022.
html: Tab between the buttons to see keyboard focus. Click them to see mouse focus.
challenge: The buttons suppress all focus outlines. Add .button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a855f7; outline-offset: 3px; } so keyboard users see a clear ring but mouse clicks stay clean.
realWorldUsage: Universal best practice for interactive elements — buttons, links, form controls, and custom focusable components. It replaced the old pattern of checking JavaScript input modality. Most modern design systems apply :focus-visible globally as part of their reset layer.
